chunks.text: 1 Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1559 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 7510/2022 3.For hearing of main case 04-10-2022 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks his appointment at the place of his father, who died during pendency of C.P.No.D-2567 of 2011 entitling the petitioner for his appointment in Taluka Municipal Administration, Taluka New Sukkur at the place of his father. It is an admitted position that father of the petitioner was appointed as Sanitary Worker in TMA, Sukkur on contract basis vide Order dated 15.05.2007. He then filed C.P.No.D-2567 of 2011 for regularization of his service; however, during pendency of said petition, he expired on 18.04.2014 and subsequently, vide Office Order dated 25.05.2021, service of the deceased father of the petitioner was regularized after seven years of his death by the Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur Municipal Corporation ignoring the fact that the petitioner’s father has already expired. Hence, it is an admitted position that at the time of his death, the petitioner’s father was a contract employee. Hence, the petitioner has no legal right for his appointment at the place of his father, who died while serving as Sanitary Worker on contract basis. Hence, this petition stands dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
